name: French Onion Lamb Au Jus
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a slow cooker.
2. Cook for 8 to 10 hours on low heat.
3. Remove the roast and let it rest for 20 minutes before carving.
4. Slice thinly.
5. Serve on French rolls or large croissants, sliced and buttered with slices of Swiss cheese.
6. Dip in bowls of onion soup broth.
7. For a complete dinner, add vegetables to the broth.
